ddls:
CREATE TABLE "circuit_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit board */,
  "board_type" TEXT /* Type of the circuit board (e.g., Model A, Model B) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number assigned to the circuit board */,
  "manufacturing_batch" TEXT /* Manufacturing batch number */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the circuit board was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the circuit board (e.g., in production, tested, passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the circuit board */,
  "manufacturing_location" TEXT /* Location where the board was manufactured */,
  "design_version" TEXT /* Version of the design */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the board */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the test station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test station (e.g., Building A, Floor 3) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the test station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the test station (e.g., electrical, physical) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of boards that can be tested simultaneously */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board being tested */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test station where the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., electrical, physical) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "test_documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES test_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board the pin is on */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin (e.g., U3.32) */,
  "net_name" TEXT /* Name of the net the pin is connected to */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the pin position in millimeters */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the pin position in millimeters */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a reference point in millimeters */,
  "reading" REAL /* Electrical reading in ohms */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., input, output, power) */,
  "pin_function" TEXT /* Function of the pin */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the pin's readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_net_name FOREIGN KEY ("net_name") REFERENCES nets ("net_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "nets" (
  "net_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net */,
  "net_name" TEXT /* Name of the net (e.g., ACGND2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the net */,
  "net_type" TEXT /* Type of the net (e.g., power, ground, signal) */,
  "net_function" TEXT /* Function of the net */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the net's readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., electrical, physical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the test in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the test tool (e.g., Multimeter, Caliper) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test tool */,
  "tool_model" TEXT /* Model of the test tool */,
  "tool_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the test tool */,
  "tool_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "tool_next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition (e.g., ambient temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition during the test */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result detail */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test tool used */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test result detail */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition during the test */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition */,
  "tool_reading" TEXT /* Reading from the tool */,
  "tool_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the tool reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_details_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_details_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_details_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES test_tools ("tool_id")
)
